top_signals.title: Iran Avoids Shared US Photo at Summit
top_signals.summary: Iran’s delegation briefly entered the Lake Lucerne Summit meeting room before leaving, reflecting Tehran’s reported refusal to participate in a joint photograph with US officials amid sensitive diplomatic negotiations. Bloomberg News' Bastian Benrath-Wright' joins Bloomberg This Weekend to explain that despite the public snub and behind-the-scenes wrangling over protocol, Iranian, US, Qatari and Pakistani representatives later took their seats and proceeded with talks behind closed doors. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Senate eyes Hegseth travel cuts without probes into Iran school bombing, boat strikes
top_signals.summary: Senate lawmakers added a provision in the NDAA that would restrict Hegseth's travel expenses until the department releases certain operational information.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fed Governor Bowman Spoke at Private Dinner After Policy Meeting - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Fed Governor Bowman Spoke at Private Dinner After Policy Meeting  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
